channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic is being traded by the reigning Western Conference champion Dallas Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Anthony Davis, a person with knowledge of the agreement said early Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: What to know about security measures at the Super Bowl in New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — After a New Year's Day attack struck at the heart of the French Quarter, officials in New Orleans say they are confident in the security plans they have in place for the Super Bowl. Upwards of 125,000 visitors are expected to converge on the Big Easy beginning Feb.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: David Benavidez dominates David Morell with unanimous decision win to unify light heavyweight title
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — David Benavidez unified the light heavyweight championship by earning a unanimous decision over challenger David Morrell on Saturday night to keep his interim WBC belt and win the WBA title.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Calipari gets lukewarm response in return to Kentucky as Arkansas coach
item.description: LEXINGTON, Ky (AP) — John Calipari received a mixed reception on his return to Rupp Arena on Saturday night, then got the last laugh when his Arkansas Razorbacks beat No. 12 Kentucky 89-79. “It’s hard to win in here.
item.dc:creator: KEITH TAYLOR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LeBron James has a triple-double and another win at Madison Square Garden as Lakers beat Knicks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — LeBron James had 33 points, 12 assists and 11 rebounds in his 10th triple-double of the season, enjoying another memorable night at Madison Square Garden and leading the Los Angeles Lakers to a 128-112 victory over the New York Knicks on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: A Blackhawks record: Landon Slaggert scores 7 seconds into a game against Florida
item.description: Landon Slaggert scored seven seconds into Chicago's game at the Panthers on Saturday afternoon — the fastest goal to start a game ever for the Blackhawks, according to the NHL record book.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jets-Capitals midseason showdown of the top teams in the NHL lives up to that billing
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The top two teams in the NHL facing off in front of a fired-up sellout crowd of over 18,500 fans on an early February Saturday night in the U.S. capital did not disappoint.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Solo Ball's big night helps No. 25 UConn win 77-69 at No. 9 Marquette
item.description: Solo Ball scored a career-high 25 points while shooting 7 of 9 from 3-point range as No. 25 UConn never trailed in a 77-69 victory over No. 9 Marquette on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Eagles' A.J. Brown recalls feeling like a 'paid actor' at previous Super Bowl, a loss to the Chiefs
item.description: Next Sunday's game between the AFC champion Kansas City Chiefs and NFC champion Philadelphia Eagles is a rematch of the 2023 Super Bowl, which Kansas City won.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baseball greats, executives, family, fans and friends remember late Hall of Famer Rickey Henderson
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — When Ken Griffey Jr.'s own baseball-star father struggled to get through to the talented teen, Rickey Henderson somehow could.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arizona State coach Bobby Hurley waves players off court after testy finish against rival Arizona
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Tommy Lloyd and Bobby Hurley met near midcourt during pregame, exchanging pleasantries, patting each other on the back. An afternoon of chirping and a late headbutt sent the coaches in opposite directions by the time the rivalry game was over.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Famed NFL agent Leigh Steinberg looking to combat concussion dangers with new foundation
item.description: Sports agent Leigh Steinberg launched the Leigh Steinberg Foundation, which aims to educate parents and fund research for concussion treatment in sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pitcher Michael King, Padres agree to $7.75 million contract, avoid arbitration
item.description: Pitcher Michael King and the San Diego Padres avoided an arbitration hearing when they agreed Friday to a one-year deal guaranteeing $7.75 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres FanFest returns to Petco Park: what to know before you go
item.description: It's that time of year again: Padres FanFest is back and is expected to be bigger than ever, according to a spokesperson with the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Grand Valley Climbing Gym to host climbing competition
item.description: Zangrilli states, “The coolest thing for us is watching kids that come to us join our program, who have zero climbing experience, very quickly, find a really nice core group of kids on the team, and through that team community, they start to thrive.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Kawamoto, KREX 5

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Porzingis hits eight 3s, scores 34 as Bulls open 3-game road trip with blowout loss in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Kristaps Porzingis scored 26 of his season-high 34 points in the first half Wednesday night, and the Boston Celtics coasted to a 122-100 victory over the Bulls in the first game of Chicago's three-game road trip.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Connor Bedard's spectacular goal sparks Blackhawks to 4-1 win over Lightning
item.description: Connor Bedard scored from a seemingly impossible angle, Arvid Soderblom stopped 34 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-1 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Alyssa Thomas heading to Mercury from Sun in trade, AP source says
item.description: The Phoenix Mercury were finalizing a deal to acquire Alyssa Thomas from the Connecticut Sun, a person familiar with the trade told The Associated Press on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lions agree to hire Broncos' John Morton as OC and promote Kelvin Sheppard to DC, AP source says
item.description: The Detroit Lions have agreed to hire Denver Broncos assistant John Morton as offensive coordinator and promote Kelvin Sheppard to defensive coordinator, according to a person familiar with the situation.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs QB Baker Mayfield to make second Pro Bowl appearance
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield was named to the 2025 Pro Bowl Games on Tuesday, marking his second appearance in two years.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: White Sox release 2025 promotional schedule
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced their promotions schedule for the 2025 MLB season, including limited-edition items and a first-ever Sunday Bobblehead Collector’s Series, to commemorate the 125-year anniversary of the team's founding.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ohio State celebrates national championship run amid change and farewells
item.description: Fans braved 30-degree temperatures to welcome home a team that beat five top-10 rivals on its way to the title, including Oregon in the Rose Bowl, Texas in the Cotton Bowl and Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff championship game.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE KRAFT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jayden Daniels auctioning off custom jacket; proceeds to benefit LAFD
item.description: Jayden Daniels may be focusing on Sunday’s NFC Championship matchup against the Philadelphia Eagles, but he doesn’t forget about where he came from. In the wake of the devastating Los Angeles area wildfires, Daniels, a San Bernardino native, is auctioning off a personalized jacket.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5
